structured_payload_candidate.title: Indirect Evaporative Cooling Air-Side Pressure Drop
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Air-side pressure drop for IEC systems typically ranges from 0.2 to 0.4 in. of water (50 to 100 Pa).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Refrigerant Sensor Installation Height
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Refrigerant sensors are generally installed 8 in. (200 mm) above the ground near both ends of every chiller.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Refrigerant Recovery Nominal Pressure

structured_payload_candidate.title: R134a Liquid Refrigerant Temperature During Recovery
structured_payload_candidate.summary: For R134a, liquid refrigerant remaining in the chiller after recovery to 25 kPa is likely to be around -5°F to -10°F (-22°C).
